# Chapter 17 Manual Meters

Manual meter entries are required for machines that do not communicate with the system and require manual reading of the meters.

## 17.1 Viewing Manual Meters

The manual meters view displays all machines configured for manual meter entry along with their prior and current values.

## 17.2 Adjusting Manual Meters

To adjust manual meters for an existing machine:

1. Select the machine.
2. For each meter, the following information is displayed:

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Name | Meter name |
| Prior Value | Previous meter reading |
| New Value | Field for entering the current reading |
| Difference | Calculated difference between prior and new values |

3. Enter the current meter readings in the applicable New Value fields.
4. Save the adjustments.

Available meters include: Coin In, Coin Out, Legacy Coin Out, Games, Bill Denominations ($1–$100), Bill In, Attendant Paid Cancelled Credits, Attendant Paid External Bonus Payout, Attendant Paid Jackpots, Attendant Paid Progressive Payout, Machine Paid External Bonus Payout, and others.

## 17.3 Entering New Manual Meters

New manual meter entries can be created for machines. This creates a new record with the same meter fields available for adjustment.
